Win an overnight escape for two at the enchanting Glenlo Abbey Hotel & Estate

The Irish Times has teamed up with the Glenlo Abbey Hotel & Estate to offer one lucky reader and their guest the chance to win an overnight stay with breakfast in the River Room and dinner in Palmers Bar & Restaurant.
Win a two-night golf break to The Hat Maker Hotel in Dungarvan

The Irish Times has teamed up with The Hat Maker Hotel to give away a two night stay for two people with breakfast and dinner. Also included in the prize are paid green fees to play all three of the Dungarvan Golf Triangle courses.
